commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=42d7e17b3c4ad7b815bccf6c4c8988899b340a61)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway restart shutdown-controller/config surface for phased force drain and also adds a Discord REST API timeout config path.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review issue: source inspection shows `deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle` always creates a default ShutdownController and reaches `process.exit(0)` around 40s while pending work remains. Current docs and tests define a 300000ms default deferral and an indefinite `0` mode.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/contributor review for restart policy, upgrade safety, branch split, and real behavior proof; this is not a safe automation takeover while proof is missing.

target.title: fix(gateway): add graduated force-close drain for gateway restart
target.body:
## Summary

Replaces the single-timeout `deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle` with a **ShutdownController** implementing a graduated 4-phase force-close cascade for gateway restart. Prevents zombie gateway processes from blocking graceful shutdown.

## Root Cause

`deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle()` had a single 300s default timeout with no force-close cascade. Active sessions and model calls were tracked but never force-terminated. On multi-node deployments, this could result in zombie gateway processes requiring manual intervention.

## Solution

Graduated 4-phase shutdown cascade with configurable phase durations:

```
Phase 1 (gracefulMs):    Wait for in-flight agent turns to complete normally
Phase 2 (softAbortMs):   AbortController.abort() on all tracked model calls
Phase 3 (forceCloseMs):  Destroy WebSocket connections, reject pending promises
Phase 4 (hardKillMs):    process.exit(0) if still hanging
```

Active `AbortController` instances and WebSocket connections are tracked through the ShutdownController, which progressively escalates through the cascade until the process exits cleanly.

## Config

```json
{
  "gateway": {
    "reload": {
      "forceDrain": {
        "gracefulMs": 10000,
        "softAbortMs": 20000,
        "forceCloseMs": 30000,
        "hardKillMs": 40000
      }
    }
  }
}
```

All phase durations are optional and default to reasonable values.

## Changes

- **New:** `src/gateway/shutdown-controller.ts` — phase cascade controller with AbortController/WebSocket tracking, phase logging, and configurable timeouts
- `src/infra/restart.ts` — integrate ShutdownController into defer loop (`deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle`)
- `src/gateway/server-reload-handlers.ts` — thread config through reload handlers
- `src/config/types.gateway.ts` — add `GatewayForceDrainConfig` type
- `src/config/zod-schema.ts` — add `forceDrain` schema validation
- `src/config/schema.labels.ts` — add phase labels
- `src/config/schema.help.ts` — add phase help text

## Testing

- [ ] Unit: verify each phase triggers at the configured time offset
- [ ] Unit: verify AbortController tracking accumulates correctly
- [ ] Integration: restart gateway with active model calls, verify graceful drain
- [ ] Integration: restart gateway with hung model calls, verify force-close kicks in
- [ ] Integration: verify WebSocket connections are destroyed in force-close phase
